Name: Percentage of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE out of all activity executions in the event log

Name: Frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE occurring immediately after Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION

Name: Frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in cases with total Amount above 100 euros

Name: Percentage of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE compared to the frequency of Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION

Name: Frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that include at least one approval step (e.g., Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION, Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER, or Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER)
Metric: Frequency of activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Percentage of cases where Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE appears more than once before reaching Payment Handled
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Payment Handled'

Name: Frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that originate from a rejection by PRE_APPROVER, specifically to support the goal of reducing rejections by PRE_APPROVER

Name: Percentage of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE that occur in loops involving repeated rejections and resubmissions (e.g., patterns like ... → REJECTED by X → REJECTED by EMPLOYEE → SUBMITTED → ...)

Name: Ratio of the frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE to the frequency of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE

Name: Percentage of process variants containing Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE that also contain Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER, to assess correlation with the stated goal

Name: Frequency of Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE per year to identify temporal trends related to policy or system changes
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'year'}"
